segment.source: Renders a heading, subheadline, and rich-text copy paired with one media asset (image or video file) placed right, left, above, or below the text, with optional lightbox zoom, rounded corners, and a call-to-action button. Use it for: generic body sections that combine prose with one supporting visual — the default mapping for most text-plus-picture document sections. Prefer 'Alternating Feature Section' for repeating feature rows; use 'Image Gallery' for multiple images.
